segments.text: The Lord said to my Lord,
Sit at My right hand, Till I make Your enemies Your footstool.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord shall send the rod of Your strength out of Zion.
Rule in the midst of Your enemies!
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Your people shall be volunteers In the day of Your power;
In the beauties of holiness, from the womb of the morning, You have the dew of Your youth.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord has sworn And will not relent,
You are a priest forever According to the order of Melchizedek.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord is at Your right hand;
He shall execute kings in the day of His wrath.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He shall judge among the nations,
He shall fill the places with dead bodies, He shall execute the heads of many countries.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He shall drink of the brook by the wayside;
Therefore He shall lift up the head.
segments.speaker: The Lord
